title: Optium
description: all the functions of Optifine for fabric in one modpack
body:
![Optium optimizes the game and adds the ability to customize the game, like in Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bada331ff9e0e927253f15946b3ff3b841507cd4.png)
# Resource packs and more
**Optium is a modpack that allows you to install any resource pack created for Optifine! Modpack based on Sodium**

Resource packs:

- Dramatic sky
- Fresh animations
- bare bones


</details>



## Where were the mods installed from?
All mods and resource packs from the modpack were installed in the Modrinth App when installing mods and resource packs, no third-party sites were used
which may pose a danger to ordinary users
### Not required reading
I'll say in advance that there probably won't be a modpack for two versions 1.16.5 and 1.17.1 because there is a mod for Fresh animations starting from 1.18.2 I'll probably make a modpack for 1.16.5 and 1.17.1, but without Fresh animations support, definitely do not add to the MemoryLeakFix modpack minecraft will not be able to start this description will be updated
